zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford於大約1110年出生在英國瓦維其可爾朗 勞福德時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville III36歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith32歲。他和Agnes de Warrene至少有2個女兒。他去世於1184年在英國瓦維其可爾紐波勒德 奧 阿沃享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford was born about 1110, in Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 36 and his mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 32. He had at least 2 daughters with Agnes de Warrene. He died in 1184, in Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford est né environ 1110, à Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Agnes de Warrene. Il est décédé en 1184, à Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford um 1110 in Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville III 36 und seine Mutter Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith 32. Er hatte mit Agnes de Warrene mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1184 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford è nato il circa 1110 nel Long Lawford, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Agnes de Warrene. Morì nel 1184, nel Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawfordが約1110年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロング ラウフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは36歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは32歳であった。彼はAgnes de Warreneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1184年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアニューボルド オン アボンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford(이)가 대략 1110년 영국 워윅실르 론그 로퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Agnes de Warrene(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 영국 워윅실르 뉴볼드  아폰에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Agnes de Warrene. Ele faleceu em 1184, em Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford родился около 1110 г. в местности лонг лавфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Agnes de Warrene. Он умер в 1184 г. в местности нюболд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Stuteville Lord of Long Lawford nació aproximadamente 1110, en Long Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Agnes de Warrene. Murió en 1184, en Newbold on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
